Strategic Working Capital for Business Growth & Cash Flow Management

Professional working capital solutions from $50K to $2M+ for commercial trades, civil contractors, and growing businesses. Optimise cash flow, fund expansion, and maintain operational efficiency with flexible business finance.

Working Capital Solutions for Commercial Businesses

💰

Cash Flow Management

Bridge timing gaps between project completion and payment receipt

  • Accounts receivable financing
  • Seasonal cash flow smoothing
  • Project completion funding
  • Supplier payment timing optimisation
📈

Business Expansion Capital

Strategic funding for growth opportunities and market expansion

  • New territory expansion
  • Additional crew hiring
  • Service line diversification
  • Market opportunity capture
🔧

Operational Working Capital

Day-to-day operational funding for established commercial trades

  • Material and supply purchases
  • Payroll and contractor payments
  • Overhead and operational expenses
  • Insurance and compliance costs
🎯

Project-Based Funding

Specialized funding for large commercial and civil projects

  • Contract mobilization funding
  • Material pre-purchase financing
  • Performance bond support
  • Project completion guarantees

Common Working Capital Scenarios We Solve

The Growth Opportunity

Situation: Large civil contract secured but need upfront capital for mobilization and materials.

Solution: Project-based working capital line matched to contract milestones and payment schedule.

✓ Contract executed successfully with 40% profit margin improvement

The Cash Flow Gap

Situation: Commercial electrical contractor with 60-day payment terms causing cash flow stress.

Solution: Invoice financing and working capital facility to bridge payment gaps.

✓ Smooth operations maintained with 25% business growth achieved

The Equipment Upgrade

Situation: HVAC contractor needs to upgrade fleet but wants to preserve cash for operations.

Solution: Combined equipment finance and working capital package for optimal cash management.

✓ Fleet upgraded while maintaining strong working capital position

The Seasonal Smoothing

Situation: Civil earthmoving contractor with seasonal revenue fluctuations affecting year-round operations.

Solution: Flexible credit line with seasonal draw and repayment patterns.

✓ Year-round team retained, 30% revenue increase achieved

Working Capital Finance Products

Business Credit Line

Amount: $50K - $500K

Access: Draw down as needed

Interest: Only pay on funds used

Terms: 12-24 month facilities

Best For:

  • Established businesses with predictable cycles
  • Managing supplier payment timing
  • Seasonal cash flow fluctuations
  • Opportunity capture funding

Term Business Loan

Amount: $100K - $2M+

Access: Lump sum advance

Repayment: Fixed monthly payments

Terms: 12-60 months

Best For:

  • Major business expansion projects
  • Large equipment and infrastructure
  • Business acquisition opportunities
  • Significant working capital injection

Project Finance Facility

Amount: $200K - $5M+

Access: Milestone-based draws

Security: Project contracts/assets

Terms: Project duration + 6-12 months

Best For:

  • Large civil and commercial projects
  • Infrastructure development contracts
  • Multi-stage project delivery
  • Performance bond requirements

Our Working Capital Assessment Process

1

Business Analysis

Comprehensive review of your business model, cash flow patterns, growth trajectory, and working capital requirements.

2

Solution Design

Strategic structuring of working capital facilities to optimise cash flow timing, minimise interest costs, and support growth objectives.

3

Lender Matching

Access to specialized commercial lenders with deep understanding of your industry and business model requirements.

4

Facility Establishment

Professional management of documentation, settlement, and ongoing facility management to ensure optimal utilisation.

Strategic Advantages of Professional Working Capital

Cash Flow Optimization

Maintain smooth operations regardless of customer payment timing. Bridge the gap between completing work and receiving payment to keep business flowing.

Growth Enablement

Seize large contracts and expansion opportunities without cash flow constraints. Scale operations strategically with adequate working capital backing.

Supplier Relationships

Negotiate better terms with suppliers through prompt payment capabilities. Access volume discounts and preferred supplier status.

Operational Stability

Maintain consistent workforce and operations during seasonal fluctuations or economic uncertainty. Build resilient business operations.

Strategic Flexibility

Respond quickly to market opportunities, emergency repairs, or competitive challenges without liquidity constraints limiting your options.

Professional Management

Expert guidance on optimal facility utilization, cash flow forecasting, and strategic business finance planning throughout the relationship.

Industries We Specialize In

Civil Contractors

Earthmoving, road construction, infrastructure development, and large-scale civil projects with complex payment cycles.

Commercial Trades

Electrical, plumbing, HVAC, and specialized commercial trade contractors serving business and industrial clients.

Industrial Services

Mining support services, industrial maintenance, manufacturing support, and specialized industrial contractors.

Professional Services

Engineering consultancies, project management firms, and professional service businesses with project-based revenue.

Ready to Optimize Your Business Cash Flow?

Join successful commercial trades and civil contractors who've secured strategic working capital to fuel sustainable growth and operational excellence.
